name: Dr. Maria Puig
description: Principal investigator at CRG (Centre for Genomic Regulation), specialising in genome editing and CRISPR-based therapeutic strategies.

name: Prof. Jordi Mas
description: Full professor of Microbiology at the Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona. Expert in environmental microbiology and bioremediation.

name: Dr. Laia Ferrer
description: Senior scientist at CSIC, leading research on cancer immunotherapy and CAR-T cell development.

name: Dr. Andreu Palou
description: Director of the Nutrigenomics and Obesity research group at UIB. Keynote speaker on personalised nutrition and metabolic health.

name: Dr. Elena Molina
description: Co-founder and CSO of a Barcelona-based synthetic biology startup. Expert in metabolic engineering for sustainable bioproduction.

name: Dr. Marc Subirana
description: Researcher at IRB Barcelona working on protein structure prediction and drug discovery using AI-driven tools.

name: Dr. Núria Vidal
description: Regulatory affairs specialist with 15 years of experience guiding biotech startups through EMA approval processes.

name: Dr. Xavier Grau
description: Science communicator and virologist at CIBEREHD. Experienced TEDx speaker on emerging infectious diseases.

name: Roche Diagnostics
description: Global leader in in-vitro diagnostics and personalised medicine. Showcasing their latest oncology and infectious disease diagnostic platforms.

name: Novartis
description: Multinational pharmaceutical company presenting advances in gene therapies and small molecule drug discovery.

name: Almirall
description: Barcelona-headquartered pharmaceutical company focused on dermatology. Presenting career opportunities in their R&D department.

name: Grifols
description: Spanish multinational pharmaceutical company specialising in plasma-derived medicines. Stand showcasing their global operations.

name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
description: World leader in laboratory equipment, reagents, and consumables. Demonstrating their latest PCR systems and cell biology tools.

name: Merck Life Science
description: Supplier of reagents, kits, and tools for research labs. Presenting their CRISPR editing portfolio and sequencing consumables.

name: Bioiberica
description: Spanish company producing pharmaceutical-grade biomolecules from animal-origin raw materials. Focus on nutraceuticals and biosimilars.

name: IDIBELL
description: Bellvitge Biomedical Research Institute. Presenting their postdoctoral and PhD fellowship programmes for congress attendees.

name: CataloniaBio & HealthTech
description: Cluster organisation supporting life science companies in Catalonia. Information on funding programmes, incubators, and ecosystem support.

name: ASBTEC
description: Associació de Biotecnòlegs de Catalunya — organiser of BAC 2026. Information stand about membership, initiatives, and future events.
